title: privacy: Real private product codenames leak into tracked, shipped files: 'fitkind' (12x in README incl. broken ex…
description:
[P1 · privacy · audit] Real private product codenames leak into tracked, shipped files: 'fitkind' (12x in README incl. broken example paths, plus shipped source src/catalog/types.ts comments with bundle IDs com.fitkind.app / app.fitkind.dev), a named 'Sitches' pilot (docs/sitches-pilot.md, examples/manifests/sitches-pilot.v1.json, keel spec S-002), and 'brandie'. examples/atlas/ was scrubbed to example-* but README/source/docs still reference the old names.

Evidence: git grep -cni fitkind: README.md:12, src/catalog/types.ts:3 ('com.fitkind.app'); git grep sitches: docs/sitches-pilot.md:10, examples/manifests/sitches-pilot.v1.json:14. README.md:220-322 reference manifest.fitkind-mobile.v1.json.

Fix: Rename all fitkind/sitches/brandie references to neutral example names (example-app/example-brand) across README, src/catalog/types.ts, docs/sitches-pilot.md, examples/manifests, and keel specs; delete or genericise docs/sitches-pilot.md.

Source: launch-readiness audit 2026-06-18
